claims.evidence_text: Two-thirds of the plots were given the industry-standard fertilizer dose of 80 kilograms of nitrogen, 40 kilograms of phosphorus, and 40 kilograms of potassium per hectare.
claims.claim_summary: Industry-standard fertilizer dose for spring wheat trial was 80 kg N/ha.

claims.evidence_text: the industry-standard fertilizer dose of 80 kilograms of nitrogen, 40 kilograms of phosphorus, and 40 kilograms of potassium per hectare
claims.claim_summary: Industry-standard fertilizer dose for spring wheat trial included 40 kg P/ha.

claims.evidence_text: the industry-standard fertilizer dose of 80 kilograms of nitrogen, 40 kilograms of phosphorus, and 40 kilograms of potassium per hectare
claims.claim_summary: Industry-standard fertilizer dose for spring wheat trial included 40 kg K/ha.

claims.evidence_text: More than 26,000 spikes were annotated with an average of 83 spikes per plot image.
claims.claim_summary: Wheat spike density averaged 83 spikes per plot image in field phenotyping dataset (image-based count, not area-normalized).
